diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Maffucci syndrome associated with a nonfunctional pituitary adenoma
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with multiple enchondromas and hemangiomas, characteristic of Maffucci syndrome. Brain MRI revealed two intracranial tumors: a jugular foramen chondrosarcoma and a suprasellar lesion suggestive of a pituitary macroadenoma. Histopathological examination confirmed the diagnoses of chondrosarcoma and pituitary adenoma. DNA sequencing demonstrated identical IDH1 mutations in both tumors, supporting the inclusion of pituitary adenomas among tumors characterizing Maffucci syndrome.
